name: codex-deep-research
description: V0 scaffold for async deep research workflows in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Install the v0 Codex Deep Research skeleton for launching bounded runner workflows, checking run status, and generating Markdown report outputs as the foundation for later research pipeline phases.
defaultPrompt: Start a deep research run about this technical question.
Show status for a deep research run.
Open the report from the latest deep research run.
